title: PaginatedList
description: A paginated list of results returned by list and query endpoints. All paginated responses follow the same structure with a results array, pagination info, and object type.

results.description: The array of result objects for the current page.

next_cursor.description: The cursor to use for the next page of results, or null if there are no more results.

has_more.description: Whether there are more results available beyond this page.

type.description: The type of objects in the results array.

request_id.description: A unique identifier for this API request.
